meaning: adj.加了咖喱(或咖喱粉的),用咖哩粉调理的
examples: The curried call gives rise to the partial application of the closure.
Changing business rules are readily accommodated using curried closures.
Kedgeree is a dish of curried rice, flaked fish, parsley and boiled eggs.
For the main course spiced cod with curried vegetables and the curried monkfish are winners.
There were curried and primavera versions, and an egregiously un-kosher one fried in bacon fat.
